en: Now Boaz had gone up to the gate and sat down there. And behold, the redeemer, of whom Boaz had spoken, came by. So Boaz said, "Turn aside, friend; sit down here." And he turned aside and sat down.
zh: 波阿斯到了城門，坐在那裡，波阿斯所說那個有買贖權的近親剛巧路過那裡。波阿斯說：“喂，老兄，過來坐一下吧。”他就過去坐下來了。

en: And he took ten men of the elders of the city and said, "Sit down here." So they sat down.
zh: 波阿斯又邀請城裡的十個長老，對他們說：“請坐在這裡。”他們就坐下來了。

en: Then he said to the redeemer, "Naomi, who has come back from the country of Moab, is selling the parcel of land that belonged to our relative Elimelech.
zh: 他對那那個有買贖權的近親說：“從摩押地回來的拿俄米，現在要賣我們族兄以利米勒的那塊地；

en: So I thought I would tell you of it and say, 'Buy it in the presence of those sitting here and in the presence of the elders of my people.' If you will redeem it, redeem it. But if you will not, tell me, that I may know, for there is no one besides you to redeem it, and I come after you." And he said, "I will redeem it."
zh: 我想把這一件事告訴你，請你眾民的長老，還有在座的各位面前，把它買下來吧。如果你肯贖就贖，假如不肯，就說出來，讓我知道；因為除了你當贖它之外，我是第一候補。”那人說：“我肯贖。”

en: Then Boaz said, "The day you buy the field from the hand of Naomi, you also acquire Ruth the Moabite, the widow of the dead, in order to perpetuate the name of the dead in his inheritance."
zh: 波阿斯說：“你從拿俄米手中買下那塊地的時候，你也得娶 已死的人的妻子摩押女子路得，使已死的人的名字留在他的產業上。”

en: Then the redeemer said, "I cannot redeem it for myself, lest I impair my own inheritance. Take my right of redemption yourself, for I cannot redeem it."
zh: 那有買贖權的近親說：“那我就不能贖它了，只怕損害了我的產業。你可以贖我當贖的，因為我沒有辦法贖了。”

en: Now this was the custom in former times in Israel concerning redeeming and exchanging: to confirm a transaction, the one drew off his sandal and gave it to the other, and this was the manner of attesting in Israel.
zh: 從前在以色列，無論買贖或是交易，決定甚麼事，當事人就要脫鞋給對方。這是以色列中作證的方式。

en: So when the redeemer said to Boaz, "Buy it for yourself," he drew off his sandal.
zh: 那有買贖權的近親對波阿斯說：“你自己買下來吧。”就把鞋脫下來。

en: Then Boaz said to the elders and all the people, "You are witnesses this day that I have bought from the hand of Naomi all that belonged to Elimelech and all that belonged to Chilion and to Mahlon.
zh: 波阿斯對長老和眾人說：“今天你們都是見證人，所有屬於以利米勒、基連和瑪倫的，我都從拿俄米手中買下來了。

en: Also Ruth the Moabite, the widow of Mahlon, I have bought to be my wife, to perpetuate the name of the dead in his inheritance, that the name of the dead may not be cut off from among his brothers and from the gate of his native place. You are witnesses this day."
zh: 我也娶了 瑪倫的妻子摩押女子路得作妻子，使已死的人的名字留在他的產業上，免得他的名字在本族本鄉中除掉。今天你們都是見證人。”

en: Then all the people who were at the gate and the elders said, "We are witnesses. May the LORD make the woman, who is coming into your house, like Rachel and Leah, who together built up the house of Israel. May you act worthily in Ephrathah and be renowned in Bethlehem,
zh: 聚集在城門的眾人和長老都說：“我們都是見證人。願耶和華使進你家的這女人，像建立以色列家的拉結和利亞二人一樣。願你在以法他顯大，在伯利恆揚名。

en: and may your house be like the house of Perez, whom Tamar bore to Judah, because of the offspring that the LORD will give you by this young woman."
zh: 願耶和華從這少婦賜你後裔，使你的家像他瑪從猶大所生法勒斯的家一般。”

en: So Boaz took Ruth, and she became his wife. And he went in to her, and the LORD gave her conception, and she bore a son.
zh: 於是波阿斯娶了路得作妻子，與她親近。耶和華使她懷孕生了一個兒子。

en: Then the women said to Naomi, "Blessed be the LORD, who has not left you this day without a redeemer, and may his name be renowned in Israel!
zh: 婦女對拿俄米說：“耶和華是應當稱頌的，因為他今天沒有斷絕你有買贖權的近親，願他在以色列中揚名。

en: He shall be to you a restorer of life and a nourisher of your old age, for your daughter-in-law who loves you, who is more to you than seven sons, has given birth to him."
zh: 他必甦醒你的生命，養你的老，因為他是愛你的媳婦所生的；有她比有七個兒子更好。”

en: Then Naomi took the child and laid him on her lap and became his nurse.
zh: 拿俄米把孩子接過來，抱在懷中，作他的保姆。

en: And the women of the neighborhood gave him a name, saying, "A son has been born to Naomi." They named him Obed. He was the father of Jesse, the father of David.
zh: 鄰近的婦女要給他起名字，說：“拿俄米生了孩子了。”就給他起名叫俄備得；這俄備得是耶西的父親，耶西是大衛的父親。

en: Now these are the generations of Perez: Perez fathered Hezron,
zh: 以下是法勒斯的後代：法勒斯生希斯崙，

en: Hezron fathered Ram, Ram fathered Amminadab,
zh: 希斯崙生蘭，蘭生亞米拿達，

en: Amminadab fathered Nahshon, Nahshon fathered Salmon,
zh: 亞米拿達生拿順，拿順生撒門，

en: Salmon fathered Boaz, Boaz fathered Obed,
zh: 撒門生波阿斯，波阿斯生俄備得，

en: Obed fathered Jesse, and Jesse fathered David.
zh: 俄備得生耶西，耶西生大衛。
